parameters.query: SELECT count(*)::int AS hit FROM agent_projects WHERE id = $1::uuid;

-- Always-one-row pattern (codex F-001): even when no spec matches, downstream nodes
-- still receive an item so we can return a controlled spec_not_found.
WITH s AS (
  SELECT id, status, project_id, task_id, title, summary, body_markdown, requirements, acceptance_criteria, constraints, dependencies, non_goals
  FROM agent_specifications WHERE id = $1::uuid
)
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM s)::int AS hits,
  (SELECT row_to_json(s) FROM s LIMIT 1) AS spec_row;

-- Idempotency hit MUST match the same (project_id, spec_id) as the request, so a key
-- cannot replay an unrelated row across projects/specs (codex F-003 hardening).
WITH hit AS (
  SELECT id, status, version, project_id, task_id, spec_id, build_artifact_id, reviewer, codex_status, codex_run_id, findings, summary, created_at, updated_at
  FROM agent_verifications
  WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL
    AND idempotency_key = NULLIF($1::text, '')
    AND project_id = $2::uuid
    AND spec_id = $3::uuid
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM hit)::int AS hits, (SELECT row_to_json(hit) FROM hit) AS row;

parameters.jsCode:

return [{ json: { __upstream_error: { ok: false, error: 'model_unavailable', detail: typeof err === 'string' ? err : (err.message || JSON.stringify(err).slice(0, 500)) } } }];

meta.version_note: Round 4 — codex adversarial-review reached severity-filtered closure. Passes 3 and 4 produced NO fresh critical findings; all pass-3/pass-4 'high' findings are rediscoveries of previously documented accepted risks (AR-V10: codex async fire-and-forget — codex worker F-V1 polls the queue authoritatively on 60s; AR-V12: APEX_CODEX_RUN_TOKEN is one global token, not per-verification — F-V5 sidecar adopts per-run signed payload; pass-3 jsonBody:JSON.stringify mirrors the production Spec Agent v1.1 idiom AGEN-WKFL-spec-workflow-v1@AsMSskfYq3FMAhAo; pass-4 get_latest cross-project leak is precluded by get_latest_verification RPC WHERE clause `project_id=$1 AND spec_id=$2`, which returns NULL → not_found on any mismatch — confirmed safe). Per closure rule (no fresh CRITICAL/HIGH for two consecutive passes), the workflow is ship-gate ready. Pass-3 mediums F-007/F-008/F-009 fixed in this round: callback redaction set unified with the canonical pattern set, summary truncation reserves headroom for the codex sentence (F-009/F-012), memory sink uses redact-then-truncate via a Memory Payload code node (F-008). Pass-2 fixes shipped: Fetch Spec always-one-row, codex_callback requires APEX_CODEX_RUN_TOKEN, get_latest minimal projection, expanded pre-redaction patterns, AC ids normalized in Check Spec. Pass-1 fixes shipped: skip_codex requires APEX_SMOKE_TOKEN, Fire Codex Async gated on codex_status='queued', scoped idempotency SQL, criteria_* dropped from replay responses, artifact/spec/notes pre-redacted, total body size cap, codex_callback shape+size validation, status_override forbidden to upgrade to 'pass', codex_run_id required for failed callbacks, doc-control skipped when env unset, memory-sink defence-in-depth redaction.

credentials_required.name: APEX Webhook Token
credentials_required.note: Bound on the Webhook node — header validated by n8n before workflow runs.

meta.prompt_drift_policy: The inline system prompt in 'Build Prompt' is a deliberately-tightened operational subset of AGEN-PRMPT-verification-system-prompt-v1.md. The Parse + Validate Verdict node enforces every structural invariant the prompt cannot mechanically guarantee (status downgrade rules, finding shape, secret redaction, criterion coverage, codex-pending sentence). When the canonical prompt's MEANING changes, both this inline copy AND the validator MUST be updated together.
meta.codex_dispatch_policy: Always queue (codex_status='queued') unless ?skip_codex=true on the smoke-test path. Codex async sidecar (env APEX_CODEX_BRIDGE_URL) consumes the queue; when unset, the deterministic row is still returned immediately and an operator/manual codex_bridge.py adversarial-review + codex_callback POST satisfies the recursive-review contract (AR-V7).
meta.approve_action_owner: Project Manager Agent — call /webhook/project-manager with action=advance_task. Verification Agent does NOT close tasks.
